  "version": "2.0.0",
  "tasks": [
    {
      "label": "Compilar Allegro",
      "type": "shell",
      "command": "gcc",
      "args": [
        "src/*.c",
        "-IC:/allegro/include",
        "-LC:/allegro/lib",
        "-o",
        "bin/jogo.exe",

        "-lallegro-5",
        "-lallegro_main-5",
        "-lallegro_primitives-5",
        "-lallegro_font-5",
        "-lallegro_ttf-5"
      ],
      "group": "build"
    }
  ]
}
